zh.lifeSummary: 當Adélaïde de Brabant於大約1190年出生在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文時，她的父親Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen31歲，母親Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace29歲。她於1225年2月24日與Guillaume d'Auvergne在比利時布拉班特 瓦隆奧迪尼尼-盧瓦-拉-福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1260年3月9日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adélaïde de Brabant于大约1190年出生在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文时，她的父亲Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen31岁，母亲Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace29岁。她于1225年2月24日与Guillaume d'Auvergne在比利时布拉班特 瓦隆奧迪尼尼-盧瓦-拉-福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1260年3月9日在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brabant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Aristide, Marcel, Normand, Ovila, Yvan.
French, Walloon, Flemish, and German: habitational name from Brabant, a province in the Low Countries.

English: cognate of 1 above, from Old French Brabant, Middle English Braban, Brabayn, used to denote both the region and an inhabitant of it. See also the synonymous Brabazon . In medieval England, Brabans were typically linen weavers and cloth merchants. The final syllable of Braban, when weakly stressed, was often altered to -ben, -bin, or -bon, and also to -bam. The additional -t or -d in post-medieval Brabant, Braband , etc. is probably excrescent, rather than a relic of the Old French form.

variants.name: Brabender
meanings: German (mainly Westphalia): habitational name for someone from Brabant (see   Brabant  ), perhaps applied also as a nickname for a merchant of Brabantine cloth.

variants.name: Brabazon
meanings: English: from Old French Brabançon, Anglo-Norman French Brabanzon, Middle English Brab(a)son ‘Brabanter’. This was originally an ethnic name for a native of the duchy of Brabant (now in north Belgium). Medieval Brabant was widely known for two exports, its brutal mercenary soldiers and its linen cloth. In the 13th century parts of France were devastated by marauding gangs of armed Brabanters, and brabançon came to be used generically to denote a mercenary, hired assassin, or robber. These originated in Brabant and Flanders, but in the course of time accepted recruits from anywhere. The true source of the surname is the presence in many English (and Irish) towns of Brabant cloth merchants.

variants.name: Bremner
meanings: Scottish: habitational name for someone from Brabant in the Low Countries, from Older Scots Brebner, Brabanare ‘native or inhabitant of Brabant’ (see Brabant and compare with the synonymous Brabazon ). Weavers from Brabant settled early at Aberdeen and on the east coast of Scotland.
German: habitational name for someone from the city of Bremen. This surname is very rare in Germany.

variants.name: Brabham
meanings: English: variant of Brabant , altered by association with English habitational names ending in -ham.

variants.name: Braband
meanings: German and English: variant of   Brabant  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Adélaïde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Adélaïde de Brabant was born about 1190, in Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium, her father, Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, was 31 and her mother, Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace, was 29. She married Guillaume d'Auvergne on 24 February 1225, in Ottignies-Louvain-La-Neuve, Walloon Brabant, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 9 March 1260, in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adélaïde de Brabant est née environ 1190, à Leuven, Brabant Flamand, Belgique, son père, Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume d'Auvergne le 24 février 1225, à Ottignies-Louvain-La-Neuve, Brabant wallon, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 9 mars 1260, à Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adélaïde de Brabant um 1190 in Leuven, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen 31 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace 29. Sie hat am 24. Februar 1225 in Ottignies-Louvain-La-Neuve, Wallonisch Brabant, Belgien Guillaume d'Auvergne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 9. März 1260 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adélaïde de Brabant è nata il circa 1190 nel Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio, sua padre, Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume d'Auvergne il 24 febbraio 1225, nel Ottignies-Louvain-La-Neuve, Brabant wallon, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 marzo 1260, nel Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adélaïde de Brabantが約1190年にベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントレウベンで生まれた時，父Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingenは31歳，母Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsaceは29歳であった。1225年2月24日にベルギーブラバント ワロンオッティグニース-ロウベイン-ラ-ネウブでGuillaume d'Auvergneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1260年3月9日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランドで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adélaïde de Brabant(이)가 대략 1190년 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 레우븐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1225년 2월 24일 벨기에 브라반트 월런 오티그니스-루바인-라-니우브에서 Guillaume d'Auvergne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1260년 3월 9일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 클레몽-페랜드에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adélaïde de Brabant nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, seu pai, Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume d'Auvergne em 24 de fevereiro de 1225, em Ottignies-Louvain-La-Neuve, Brabant wallon, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 9 de março de 1260, em Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adélaïde de Brabant родилась около 1190 г. в местности леувен, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume d'Auvergne 24 февраля 1225 г. в местности оттигниес-лоувеин-ла-неув, брабант валлон, Бельгия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 9 марта 1260 г. в местности клирмонт-фирранд, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adélaïde de Brabant nació aproximadamente 1190, en Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, su papá, Hendrik I van Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Boulogne-Alsace, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Guillaume d'Auvergne el 24 de febrero de 1225, en Ottignies-Louvain-La-Neuve, Brabant wallon, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de marzo de 1260, en Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 71 años.
